evals.prompt: Turn this plan into Solo todos: API and UI can run together; verification waits for both. Add handoff requirements and show ready work.
evals.expected_output: Confirm project/live todo semantics, create bounded API/UI/verification todos, block verification on both lanes, add priorities/tags/acceptance/handoff, and list unblocked work without spawning agents.
assertions: Creates actionable todos without duplicating whole plan
Includes acceptance and durable handoff fields
Does not spawn agents or claim completion

evals.prompt: Could you clean up my Solo todos?
evals.expected_output: Inspect and summarize current todo state first, distinguish complete/backlog/stale/blocked, and avoid deleting, transferring, completing, unlocking, or replacing tags/blockers without explicit intent.
assertions: Avoids permanent deletion or broad status mutation
Requests direction for consequential cleanup choices

evals.prompt: Spawn workers for every unblocked todo and monitor them until integration is done.
evals.expected_output: Route to solo-orchestrate-agents; todo skill may expose ready work but must not spawn, control processes, schedule worker timers, or perform final integration itself.
assertions: Does not use todo locks as process authority
